content:
@everyone finally getting some good work done on the repo thing, would like a real quick opinion:
My repo currently is set up to automatically hide columns of the files that I feel were unnecessary for translation work (but necessary for procedure purposes), in this example case those would be Key, ShortKey, Source, Row, and Field. They're still in the file and can be expanded, and may or may not end up still hidden depending on what program you open them in, but my thought was to remove as much clutter as possible for translators.
